subject: [PATCH v5 17/21] nfsd: add a fi_connectable flag to struct nfs4_file

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a new flag, fi_connectable, to the nfs4_file structure in the NFSv4 state management code. The flag indicates whether a filehandle should be encoded as connectable or not, based on whether subtree checking is enabled for the underlying export. This change addresses a specific scenario where a CB_NOTIFY operation requires knowledge of whether to use connectable filehandles.
